focus_location_label: Which labeled point can be the Sun at a focus of the elliptical orbit?
Which candidate point is a focus of the shown ellipse?
Choose the labeled point that lies at a focus of the shown ellipse.
Which option marks a valid focus location for the Sun in this orbit?
Which labeled point is the focus location?
greatest_speed_position_label: At which labeled planet position is the orbital speed greatest?
Which labeled position has the greatest orbital speed?
Choose the planet position where the orbiting body moves fastest.
Which labeled point on the orbit has maximum speed?
Among the candidate positions, where is the orbital speed greatest?
least_speed_position_label: At which labeled planet position is the orbital speed least?
Which labeled position has the least orbital speed?
Choose the planet position where the orbiting body moves slowest.
Which labeled point on the orbit has minimum speed?
Among the candidate positions, where is the orbital speed least?

scene:orbital_motion_diagram.object_description: an elliptical orbit with labeled candidate points

query:focus_location_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the label of the candidate point that can be the Sun at a focus
query:focus_location_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x,y] pixel point at the center of the selected focus candidate marker

query:greatest_speed_position_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the label of the planet position with greatest speed
query:greatest_speed_position_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x,y] pixel point at the center of the selected planet-position marker

query:least_speed_position_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the label of the planet position with least speed
query:least_speed_position_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x,y] pixel point at the center of the selected planet-position marker
